note.fr: <ph id='william-james'>James</ph> salue en <ph id='bergson'>Bergson</ph> un allié contre l'intellectualisme : il reprend sa critique des concepts figés et sa durée mouvante pour nourrir son empirisme radical et son univers pluraliste.
note.en: <ph id='william-james'>James</ph> hails <ph id='bergson'>Bergson</ph> as an ally against intellectualism: he takes up his critique of frozen concepts and his flowing duration to feed his radical empiricism and his pluralistic universe.
